assertions.description: SharedWorker is now exposed on Android (previously disabled).
Constructing a SharedWorker yields a .port that is a MessagePort.
assertions.test: (()=>{try{const w=new SharedWorker('data:application/javascript,');const ok=w.port instanceof MessagePort;w.port.close();return ok;}catch(e){return false;}})()

assertions.description: SharedWorkerGlobalScope is the worker-side global; the interface is in the platform.
SharedWorker instances expose an onerror event handler attribute.
assertions.test: (()=>{try{const w=new SharedWorker('data:application/javascript,');const ok='onerror' in w;w.port.close();return ok;}catch(e){return false;}})()
